Class SubtermProjection

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.termProjection.SubtermProjection
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProjectionToTerm<Goal>
public class SubtermProjection extends Object implements ProjectionToTerm<Goal>
Projection for computing a subterm of a given term. The position of the subterm within the complete term is described using a PosInTerm.
